samples:
I had to fight my demons
Lost them in the flames
Don't break your heart for nothing
They just want to control you


I didn't think they would get to me
Destroy the life that I created
All of a sudden, they're gone forever
Just as they promised
They took away the power
That I built myself
Against those who wanted to destroy me
This force is no longer there


So long live the flames !
Destroy the monsters !
Injustice was done when they took us away !
The fire is all we have left now
Our last embrace !




We have the right to be here !
You cannot take this away from us !
Righteousness is on our side !
And truth will reveal itself !


So long live the flames !
Destroy the monsters !
Injustice was done when they took us away !
The fire is all we have left now
Our last embrace !


Oh please come back! We need you so much !

Lost and alone in space
I don't know what is right
In this maze of lies I fade away
But the stars are shining bright


Leave this old shell behind
And find a better place to be
Leave this world so sick and broken
Find another place for me


Get up now, get ready
To fight the battle with your soul
Throw all fear aside, let go
The weight that's holding you down



Leave this old shell behind
And find a better place to be
Leave this world so sick and broken
Find another place for me


Don't lose faith in humanity
Even when it seems too hard
Keep on fighting for the ones who care
Fight for those who can't fight anymore

Get up now, get ready
To fight the battle with your soul
Throw all fear aside, let go
The weight that's holding you down


Leave this old shell behind
And find a better place to be
Leave this world so sick and broken
Find another place for me

Nowhere to hide, I'm facing the wall
All alone in this fight I must survive
I embrace my fate and face reality
Don't get caught up inside this mess of pride


The fear of dying is killing me inside
My arms are open as you cut my veins
Oh Lord forgive me for what I have done
Leave me alone until I learn how to die

Fight fight fight fight
Fight fight fight fight
Fight fight fight fight
Fight fight fight fight

Lost illusion shattered illusions
Disillusionment awaken from trance

Fight fight fight fight
Fight fight fight fight
Fight fight fight fight
Fight fight fight fight


You can only break free if you dive deep
Inside yourself there lies your future
There’s a fire burning low beneath the ashes
Get off your back and stand upright once again

Fire burn brighter than stars on high
Your legs become stronger with every step
Strength flows through you now as you walk the path
Get ready to fly, embrace your destiny

In order to try to forget, I drink myself
Down to the bottom
But what can destroy this thing?
Can't put a name on it, but we all understand
That there is something out there


It's so hard to get away from myself
These ghosts are killing me inside


Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh


I just want to go away from here
Leave all these illusions behind
And dive into another world
Don't ever let me return, yeah
Yeah, yeah

Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh


Nowhere else to run to
Except for inside of your head
Get lost in illusion
Create and live by all that you said
Create and live by all that you said


Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh

Lost in the fog of slumber, deep awake
My attention's focused on me waking up
The silence that embraces is deafening to my ears
Oh ocean earth, wake me
I pray to all the gods and goddesses
For a vision clear as crystal flowing water
Reveal your secrets to me, open space and time
Reveal them now



Don't be afraid to dive right into the storm
Get ready to learn how you can overcome
All the obstacles in front of you
Overcome or else you fail
Carved from stone and marble
Erected high for all to see
Rising higher every day
We climb


Don't be afraid to dive right into the storm
Get ready to learn how you can overcome
All the obstacles in front of you
Overcome or else you fail
Carved from stone and marble
Erected high for all to see
Rising higher every day
We climb
Carved from stone and marble
Erected high for all to see
Rising higher every day

I'm coming out of my shell
Don't try to put me back in there
All illusions destroyed, and shattered remains left behind


Wake up from this nightmare
Come inside the circle
It is a giant circle of strength


And if you fight for what is right, justice will be served
If you fight for what is good, then peace will be yours
You fight until the end with all your strength
Until it becomes clear that everything was illusionary




Carved into stone, bright shining star
So high above us we are rising
We must protect the forest as a temple
Don't destroy it anymore


Leave this horror show alone
Save our planet Earth
No one should live forever



And if you fight for what is right, justice will be served
If you fight for what is good, then peace will be yours
You fight until the end with all your strength
Until it becomes clear that everything was illusionary


Bright shining stars at night
Awaken us to our reason
Let's build an altar on the mountain top
And burn all evidence

What comes from the sea
Don't know yet, but I dive deep down
Ocean planet Earth and sky so blue
Wake up with the whales in their circle
It's like swimming in the clouds


Ride across the land on the white horse
Of an ocean giant, all eyes are watching you
Carved with patterns, glowing bright as gold
You're entering another dimension now

Carved with patterns, glowing bright as gold
You're entering another dimension now

Enter my vision of paradise
Where mountains meet the ocean blue
The whale is singing to me a song
And I climb inside his body now

Ride across the land on the white horse
Of an ocean giant, all eyes are watching you
Carved with patterns, glowing bright as gold
You're entering another dimension now

Carved with patterns, glowing bright as gold
You're entering another dimension now

Carved with patterns, glowing bright as gold
You're entering another dimension now

The flames are growing higher
I'm falling face down on the floor
Get up, get out of here!


Lost in a maze of ash and dust
The brightest star is falling down to earth
Leave me alone
Don't try to take my life
Leave me alone
Dig for gold within this mud

Get up, get out of here!
Fight the good fight 'til the end
Rise, rise above it all
Carve your own destiny!


Lost in a maze of ash and dust
The brightest star is falling down to Earth
Leave me alone
Don't try to take my life
Leave me alone
Dig for gold within this mud

Lost in a maze of ash and dust
The brightest star is falling down to Earth
Leave me alone
Don't try to take my life
Leave me alone
Dig for gold within this mud
Leave me alone
Don't try to take my life
Leave me alone
Dig for gold within this mud

If I should die first
I will return to life straight away
Become a god of light and force the stars to shine


Indestructible force awaken within me
Awakened powers, awake, awakened
Enter a realm unknown before now
Destroy what you know destroy everything
Open your mind for the answers lie inside
Destroy your world if you must change direction
A new vision opened bright like a star
Incredible power is mine I control it all


It was just before dawn when I understood
That this force awakens in time and space
The fact that we live on this planet Earth
Is a blessing from above the stars

Enter a realm unknown before now
Destroy the world if need to change direction
A new vision opened bright like a star
Incredible power is mine I control it all


Wake up my soul awaken, awaken!
Wake up my soul awaken, awaken!
Wake up my soul awaken, awaken!
Wake up my soul awaken, awaken!

I dig myself a hole
Digging faster, digging deeper
Wandering in circles lost and confused
Surrender to the flow


Feelings inside are so dark I can’t get through it
Breakdown all this pressure on my chest
Surrender to the flow


Get off me! Get off me!

I dig myself a hole
Digging faster, digging deeper
Wandering in circles lost and confused
Surrender to the flow


Feelings inside are so dark I cannot break free
Breakdown all this pressure on my chest
Surrender to the flow

Get off me! Get off me!



Lost inside, find yourself again
You’re not alone, learn how to breathe again
Learn from your masters old, they teach you right from wrong
Leave behind what no longer works for you

Get off me! Get off me!

Broken dreams destroyed by fear 
Awake awake awaken
Don't fight this battle all alone!


Wake up now!
Wake up now!
